summary: Web app project with a Developer Control Center accessible via a subtle settings gear icon in the footer.
architectural_notes: Settings gear icon uses FontAwesome or Lucide icons, styled subtly and triggers Developer Control Center modal

existing_features.title: Add a Lucide Settings gear icon positioned exactly 10px above the copyright footer, aligned to the far right of the container. Style the icon with color rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) at rest. On hover, apply a purple glow effect using color #A855F7 with a matching filter or text-shadow glow. Make the icon a clickable element that opens the Developer Control Center modal or page when clicked.
Reduce the vertical gap between the View History button and the bottom white divider line by 50% to create a tighter, more professional layout.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add subtle settings gear icon 10px above copyright footer, far right, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) color, purple glow on hover (#A855F7), links to Developer Control Center modal
Reduce vertical gap between 'View History' and bottom white line by 50% for tighter layout
